inputs.titre: Translation des reliques de Saint Louis à la basilique de Saint-Denis

reason: The image shows a basilica-like interior with people dressed in what appears to be choir robes. The architecture seems plausible for the late 13th century, but the style of the light fixtures and the robes appears more modern. The tablet/reader held by someone on the left and the presence of modern haircuts contribute to its inaccuracy. While the general atmosphere could be interpreted as reverent, the details betray its contemporary origins.
